zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：低位震荡偏弱
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD处于低位窄幅震荡结构，价格围绕6.82运行，多空动能均衡但略偏弱，整体趋势仍受短期均线压制，尚未出现明确反转信号。

MACD维持负值且动能柱偏弱，说明空头动能仍占优势；价格位于SMA20下方，均线呈压制状态，反弹缺乏量能配合。

下方关键支撑在6.80一线，若跌破可能下探6.75区域；上方阻力6.83及6.92均线位，突破才有望打开反弹空间。

操作上建议短线以区间交易为主，6.80附近轻仓试多，6.83上方止盈；若跌破支撑应及时止损，避免趋势延续下行风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is trading at 6.8212, holding almost unchanged over the past 24 hours with a modest 0.03% gain. The narrow daily range between 6.8085 and 6.8339 reflects subdued volatility and suggests that buyers and sellers remain in near balance. Despite the stable intraday action, price continues to trade below the 20-period simple moving average at 6.91881, indicating that the broader short-term trend still favors the downside until stronger buying momentum develops.

Technical indicators reinforce this cautious outlook. The available MACD reading of -0.030039143 points to lingering bearish momentum, although the absence of a signal line prevents confirmation of whether downside pressure is strengthening or beginning to ease. Likewise, the unavailable RSI means momentum cannot be assessed through overbought or oversold conditions. In this environment, price action around key technical levels becomes more important than relying solely on momentum oscillators.

Immediate support is located near the session low around 6.8085, with additional downside risk emerging if that level fails to attract buyers. A sustained break beneath support could encourage another wave of selling toward lower psychological price zones. On the upside, initial resistance appears near the daily high of 6.8339, followed by the 20-period SMA around 6.91881. A decisive close above the moving average would improve the short-term technical picture and could attract renewed buying interest.

For traders, patience may be the most appropriate approach while the market remains confined within a tight range. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for a confirmed breakout above resistance or a clear breakdown below support before initiating new positions. More aggressive traders could consider range-based strategies with disciplined risk management and closely placed stop-loss orders. Until momentum indicators strengthen and price reclaims the moving average, maintaining a cautious bias appears justified despite the relatively stable intraday performance.
